div.div: Azure Kubernetes deployment target: zone and region redundancy

div.div: Two Azure regions make the failure model explicit. Each region has zone-redundant ingress, AKS node pools across three availability zones, private managed data services, and replicated storage/database paths.

div.div: Reading the diagram: Application Gateway, AKS node pools, and service replicas are shown per region across availability zones. PostgreSQL and storage are logical Azure services, so the diagram calls out primary/standby, PITR, ZRS zone copies, and cross-region replication instead of drawing one ambiguous storage box.
